'''Malta''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who associated with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] and [[Embra]] at [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He owned the luxury [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Brownstar]]''.

==Biography==
At some point before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Malta, along with Jabba and Embra, organized a hunt for the [[Yavin Vassilika]]. He hired [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], and [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88B]] for the contest. His assistant, [[Jozzel Moffet]], betrayed him in an attempt to become an independent [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]].<ref name="Underworld 1" />

When the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], Malta fled in a convoy of [[Yacht/Legends|yachts]] and disappeared near [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Due to extreme obesity, Malta was completely unable to move without using a [[Hoversled/Legends|repulsor sled]].<ref name="Hutt Hutt Hutt" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the comic in which Malta appears, the Hutt is stylized as an especially droopy—almost liquid—figure in a purple cape.

==Appearances==
